title: Mara’s Moonlit Count
cover_prompt: A small silver fox with a fluffy tail curled around her nose, nestled in a mossy forest glade under a soft glowing moon. Nearby, two deer rest with gentle eyes half-closed, three tiny rabbits snuggle together, and four round owls perch on a low branch, all bathed in warm, dreamy watercolor light.
lyrics:
[verse]
One fox curls up so tight
Soft paws tucked out of sight

[verse]
One fox curls up so tight
Soft paws tucked out of sight
Two deer lie down so slow
Ears drowsy, heads bowed low

[verse]
One fox curls up so tight
Soft paws tucked out of sight
Two deer lie down so slow
Ears drowsy, heads bowed low
Three rabbits close their eyes
Noses twitch in moonlit skies

[verse]
One fox curls up so tight
Soft paws tucked out of sight
Two deer lie down so slow
Ears drowsy, heads bowed low
Three rabbits close their eyes
Noses twitch in moonlit skies
Four owls rest on a limb
Wings folded, soft and dim
And that was all
style_prompt: Children's counting lullaby, clear sweet female vocal, xylophone and music box, 66 BPM, simple repetitive melody, same tune every line, cumulative nursery rhyme structure, bright but soft, childlike, extremely predictable rhythm, soft piano accompaniment

character.name: Mara
character.identity: A wise little fox who watches over the forest as the animals drift to sleep.
character.special: She knows the quietest way to guide every creature into peaceful dreams.

about: A gentle cumulative lullaby where forest friends settle down one by one under Mara’s watchful eye. The repeating, rhythmic counting softly slows busy minds, helping little listeners drift into sleep with each verse.
